smoke.description: Critical-path scenarios run on every commit. Validates essential safety and regulatory gates that must pass for any code change. Target: <5 minutes, blocking merge.
smoke.recovery_policy: auto-retry × 3 on transient failure; block merge on persistent failure; human ack required to override
smoke.rationale: Smoke suite covers the keystone workflows: Submission Readiness (RSPEC-001), PackCompleteness happy path (RSPEC-002), Swarm-Aware SORA assessment (RSPEC-006), Geofence breach action (RSPEC-015), C2 consensus timeout (RSPEC-020), DAA performance (RSPEC-022), Flight Termination (RSPEC-038), CAA/MAA Apportionment (RSPEC-055), Classification handling (RSPEC-063), and Panel-action audit trail (RSPEC-067). These represent critical regulatory and safety gates that must never regress.

regression.description: All scenarios in smoke plus major-severity scenarios and AC/keystone refusal paths. Run on merge to main; validates completeness and boundary behavior. Target: <30 minutes, blocking release.
regression.recovery_policy: auto-retry × 2 on transient; human ack required to merge on failure (except smoke-level tests auto-retry × 3)
regression.rationale: Regression suite covers all major-priority scenarios (REQ001-REQ015 acceptance paths and error paths). Includes twin-sample scenarios (Scotland approval vs SORA refusal end-to-end), all AC1-AC8 pass/fail paths, geofence/C2/termination failure modes, panel override audit trails, apportionment and classification handling. Runs before merge to main to ensure release readiness.

full.description: All 69 scenarios plus NFR gates and performance endurance tests. Run nightly and on release; validates edge cases, soak tests, and performance SLAs. Target: <2 hours, informational.
full.recovery_policy: no auto-retry; PagerDuty alert on failure if release-blocking; manual investigation required
full.rationale: Full suite validates all 69 refined scenarios including Isabel's examples, all AC1-AC8 paths, all K1-K8 keystones, NFR gates (soak tests, stress tests, spike tests per Cerf Phase 4-7), classification boundary scenarios across all tiers, and 24h endurance extract. Runs nightly for early detection of issues; mandatory before release. Performance gates (Gate 1-8 from openperformance) integrated as parallel checks.

ci_cd_integration.platform: GitHub Actions (primary) with GitLab CI mirror option
ci_cd_integration.dashboard: Allure Report (hosted in CI artifacts) with custom panels: pass rate by feature, avg exec time, flake rate, coverage % by REQ/AC/Keystone, clause-library version pin, override rate (calibration loop)
performance_gates: Gate 1 — Unit perf budget: All workbench unit tests <100ms p95
Gate 2 — Integration setup latency: Workspace creation <3s p95 (Noyce NFR-LAT-001)
Gate 3 — 1h load baseline: 50 concurrent users, p95 latency <3.5s (Ada NFR-CAP-WB-001)
Gate 4 — Stress gate (2x peak): Graceful degradation, recovery <15min (NFR-END-WB-002)
Gate 5 — 96h soak: <5% latency drift, zero connection leaks (NFR-END-WB-001)
Gate 6 — Audit log write latency p95 stable <500ms (panel override audit trail criticality per Isabel EX-011)
Gate 7 — Coverage matrix inference <5s per batch (classification tier transitions; 95th percentile)
Gate 8 — Evidence store PUT throughput >3 MB/s (spike gate per Noyce NFR-LAT-002)
required_checks_on_pr: Twin-sample regression (Scotland approval vs SORA refusal end-to-end)
required_checks_on_main_merge: Allure pass rate by feature (>95% threshold)
Performance Gate 3 (1h load baseline must pass)
required_checks_on_release: All Performance Gates 1-8 passed in last 7 days
Clause-library version pin documented in release notes
Flake rate <2% across all scenarios in last 30 days

reliability_register.mitigation: Use test double for SORA assessor (fixed decision tree per JARUS SORA v2.5 Appendix C); snapshot test SAIL assignment with ±1 SAIL level tolerance; mock CAA SORA guidance API with frozen v2.5 schema; run twice per week to detect assessor variability
Mock GPS/GCS; inject breach at deterministic time t=100ms; accept RTL latency 400-600ms range (80% tolerance); snapshot test p95 latency vs baseline ±50ms; run on dedicated test instance

Seed RNG with fixed value; inject deterministic aircraft ordering; snapshot test consensus outcome (MAINTAIN_ALTITUDE vs RTL) with consistency across 3 runs; allow either safe outcome but require run-to-run consistency

Mock DAA detector with frozen v2.0 model; fix sensor noise seed; snapshot test climb decision (YES/NO) and confidence 95-100% acceptable; allow ±5% confidence variance but not decision variance; 2x retry on divergence
Mock RF transceiver (50±10ms) and motor controller (50±30ms); snapshot test kill latency p95 <350ms (hard safety limit); 3x retry; escalate to hardware team if any run exceeds 350ms
Mock CAA/MAA signatories; use frozen policy version (e.g., CAP 722D v3.1); snapshot test matrix structure; alert on live API version mismatch; 2x retry on policy version divergence

Mock Artefact Detector with fixed ML model v1.0; test: SECRET (100%), OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE (80%+), OFFICIAL (<10%); snapshot test outcome (not confidence); allow ±5% confidence variance; 3x retry on outcome divergence

reliability_register.scenario_title: Audit log write latency database contention
reliability_register.mitigation: Run in isolated database instance; snapshot test p95 latency <600ms (safety margin); 2x retry on lock; alert if degradation >100ms detected
Stateless validation; no external dependencies; deterministic input-output mapping
Stateless artefact detection; mocked file presence checks; deterministic

panels.description: Overall pass % per feature (F01-F30) across all suites; highlights regression vectors
Average execution time per scenario; highlights slow tests
Pass % variance across last 30 days per scenario; identifies intermittent failures
panels.metric: Std dev of daily pass rate; scenarios with >5% variance flagged

panels.description: Coverage % of regulatory clauses (REQ001-REQ020), AC1-AC8 paths, and K1-K8 keystones
panels.metric: Scenarios covering REQ-X / Total REQ-X scenarios * 100%

panels.description: Clause library version used in each test run; tracks regulatory version tested
panels.metric: Clause lib version string per run (e.g., '2.1', '2.2-rc1')
panels.threshold: All runs on same version (or document version mismatch)

panels.description: Panel override rate and override audit trail completeness
panels.metric: Override decisions / Total panel decisions * 100%; audit trail presence %
panels.threshold: <5% override rate (healthy governance), 100% audit trail logging

panels.description: Status of all 8 performance gates (Gate 1-8); red/yellow/green per gate
panels.metric: Gate pass/fail; latency histogram p95 vs threshold per gate
panels.threshold: All gates green for release readiness

panels.description: Scenario coverage across classification tiers (OFFICIAL, OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE, SECRET)
panels.threshold: >80% of classification scenarios test all 3 tiers
